(fg)(n)=∑k=0nnCkf(k)g(n−k)(f g)^{(n)}=\sum_{k=0}^n{ }_n \mathrm{C}_k f^{(k)} g^{(n-k)}(fg)(n)=k=0∑n​n​Ck​f(k)g(n−k)

(x2ex)(n)=∑k=0nnCk(x2)(k)(ex)(n−k)=nC0(x2)(0)(ex)(n−0)+nC1(x2)(1)(ex)(n−1)+nC2(x2)(2)(ex)(n−2)+nC3(x3)(3)(ex)(n−3)+⋯=n!0!(n−0)!x2ex+n!1!(n−1)!2xex+n!2!(n−2)!2ex(∵x2 の 3階以上の微分は定数の微分になりゼロのため、以降の項は消える)=nnx2ex+n12xex+n(n−1)22ex=x2ex+2nxex+n(n−1)ex=ex{x2+2nx+n(n−1)}\begin{align} (x^2 e^x)^{(n)} &= \sum_{k=0}^n { }_n C_k (x^2)^{(k)} (e^x)^{(n-k)}\\ &= { }_n C_0 (x^2)^{(0)} (e^x)^{(n-0)}\\ &\quad+ { }_n C_1 (x^2)^{(1)} (e^x)^{(n-1)}\\ &\quad+ { }_n C_2 (x^2)^{(2)} (e^x)^{(n-2)}\\ &\quad+ { }_n C_3 (x^3)^{(3)} (e^x)^{(n-3)}\\ &\quad+ \cdots \\ &= \frac{n!}{0!(n-0)!} x^2 e^x\\ &\quad + \frac{n!}{1!(n-1)!} 2x e^x\\ &\quad + \frac{n!}{2!(n-2)!} 2 e^x\\ &\quad (\because x^2 \text{ の 3階以上の微分は定数の微分になりゼロのため、以降の項は消える}) \\ &= \frac{n}{n} x^2 e^x\\ &\quad + \frac{n}{1} 2x e^x\\ &\quad + \frac{n (n-1)}{2} 2 e^x \\ &= x^2 e^x + 2nx e^x + n(n-1) e^x \\ &= e^x \{ x^2 + 2nx + n(n-1) \} \end{align}(x2ex)(n)​=k=0∑n​n​Ck​(x2)(k)(ex)(n−k)=n​C0​(x2)(0)(ex)(n−0)+n​C1​(x2)(1)(ex)(n−1)+n​C2​(x2)(2)(ex)(n−2)+n​C3​(x3)(3)(ex)(n−3)+⋯=0!(n−0)!n!​x2ex+1!(n−1)!n!​2xex+2!(n−2)!n!​2ex(∵x2 の 3階以上の微分は定数の微分になりゼロのため、以降の項は消える)=nn​x2ex+1n​2xex+2n(n−1)​2ex=x2ex+2nxex+n(n−1)ex=ex{x2+2nx+n(n−1)}​​

children.value: を助変数(パラメータ)または媒介変数という. 逆関数の微分法を利用すれば,
\frac{d y}{d x}=\frac{d y}{d t} \frac{d t}{d x}=\frac{\frac{d y}{d t}}{\frac{d x}{d t}}=\frac{g^{\prime}(t)}{f^{\prime}(t)}
children.html: dydx=dydtdtdx=dydtdxdt=g′(t)f′(t)\frac{d y}{d x}=\frac{d y}{d t} \frac{d t}{d x}=\frac{\frac{d y}{d t}}{\frac{d x}{d t}}=\frac{g^{\prime}(t)}{f^{\prime}(t)}dxdy​=dtdy​dxdt​=dtdx​dtdy​​=f′(t)g′(t)​

dydt=(3at2)′(1+t3)−(3at2)(1+t3)′(1+t3)2=6at(1+t3)−3at2⋅3t2(1+t3)2=6at+6at4−9at4(1+t3)2=6at−3at4(1+t3)2\frac{dy}{dt} = \frac{(3 a t^2)' (1+t^3) - (3 a t^2) (1+t^3)'}{ (1+t^3)^2 }\\ = \frac{6 a t (1+t^3) - 3 a t^2 \cdot 3t^2}{ (1+t^3)^2 }\\ = \frac{ 6at + 6at^4 - 9at^4}{ (1+t^3)^2 }\\ = \frac{ 6at - 3at^4}{ (1+t^3)^2 }\\dtdy​=(1+t3)2(3at2)′(1+t3)−(3at2)(1+t3)′​=(1+t3)26at(1+t3)−3at2⋅3t2​=(1+t3)26at+6at4−9at4​=(1+t3)26at−3at4​

dxdt=(3at)′(1+t3)−3at(1+t3)′(1+t3)2=3a(1+t3)−3at⋅3t2(1+t3)2=3a+3at3−9at3(1+t3)2=3a−6at3(1+t3)2\frac{dx}{dt} = \frac{(3at)' (1+t^3) - 3at (1+t^3)'}{(1+t^3)^2}\\ = \frac{3a (1+t^3) - 3at \cdot 3t^2}{ (1+t^3)^2 }\\ = \frac{3a + 3a t^3 - 9at^3}{ (1+t^3)^2 }\\ = \frac{3a - 6at^3}{ (1+t^3)^2 }\\dtdx​=(1+t3)2(3at)′(1+t3)−3at(1+t3)′​=(1+t3)23a(1+t3)−3at⋅3t2​=(1+t3)23a+3at3−9at3​=(1+t3)23a−6at3​

dydx=dydtdxdt=6at−3at4(1+t3)23a−6at3(1+t3)2=6at−3at4(1+t3)2(1+t3)23a−6at3=6at−3at43a−6at3=1/31/36at−3at43a−6at3=2at−at4a−2at3=a(2t−t4)a(1−2t3)=2t−t41−2t3=t(2−t3)1−2t3\frac{d y}{d x} = \frac{\frac{d y}{d t}}{\frac{d x}{d t}} = \frac{ \frac{ 6at - 3at^4 }{ (1+t^3)^2} }{ \frac{ 3a - 6at^3 }{ (1+t^3)^2 } }\\ = \frac{ 6at - 3at^4 }{ (1+t^3)^2} \frac{ (1+t^3)^2 }{ 3a - 6at^3 }\\ = \frac{ 6at - 3at^4 }{ 3a - 6at^3 }\\ = \frac{ 1/3 }{ 1/3 } \frac{ 6at - 3at^4 }{ 3a - 6at^3 }\\ = \frac{ 2at - at^4 }{ a - 2at^3 }\\ = \frac{ a (2t - t^4) }{ a (1 - 2t^3) }\\ = \frac{ 2t - t^4 }{ 1 - 2t^3 }\\ = \frac{ t(2 - t^3) }{ 1 - 2t^3 }\\dxdy​=dtdx​dtdy​​=(1+t3)23a−6at3​(1+t3)26at−3at4​​=(1+t3)26at−3at4​3a−6at3(1+t3)2​=3a−6at36at−3at4​=1/31/3​3a−6at36at−3at4​=a−2at32at−at4​=a(1−2t3)a(2t−t4)​=1−2t32t−t4​=1−2t3t(2−t3)​

children.value:
\left(\frac{\sinh x}{\cosh x}\right)'
= \frac{(\sinh x)' \cosh x - \sinh x (\cosh x)'}{\cosh^2 x}\\
= \frac{\cosh^2 x - \sinh^2 x}{\cosh^2 x}\\
= \frac{1}{\cosh^2 x}\\
children.html: (sinh⁡xcosh⁡x)′=(sinh⁡x)′cosh⁡x−sinh⁡x(cosh⁡x)′cosh⁡2x=cosh⁡2x−sinh⁡2xcosh⁡2x=1cosh⁡2x\left(\frac{\sinh x}{\cosh x}\right)' = \frac{(\sinh x)' \cosh x - \sinh x (\cosh x)'}{\cosh^2 x}\\ = \frac{\cosh^2 x - \sinh^2 x}{\cosh^2 x}\\ = \frac{1}{\cosh^2 x}\\(coshxsinhx​)′=cosh2x(sinhx)′coshx−sinhx(coshx)′​=cosh2xcosh2x−sinh2x​=cosh2x1​
cosh⁡2x−sinh⁡2x=1\cosh^2 x - \sinh^2 x = 1cosh2x−sinh2x=1

cosh⁡2x−sinh⁡2x=(cosh⁡x+sinh⁡x)(cosh⁡x−sinh⁡x)=(ex+e−x2+ex−e−x2)(ex+e−x2−ex−e−x2)=ex+e−x+ex−e−x2ex+e−x−ex+e−x2=2ex22e−x2=exe−x=ex−x=1\begin{align} \cosh^2 x - \sinh^2 x &= (\cosh x + \sinh x)(\cosh x - \sinh x)\\ &= (\frac{e^x+e^{-x}}{2} + \frac{e^x-e^{-x}}{2}) (\frac{e^x+e^{-x}}{2} - \frac{e^x-e^{-x}}{2})\\ &= \frac{e^x+e^{-x} + e^x-e^{-x}}{2} \frac{e^x+e^{-x} - e^x+e^{-x}}{2}\\ &= \frac{2 e^x}{2} \frac{2 e^{-x}}{2}\\ &= e^x e^{-x}\\ &= e^{x-x}\\ &= 1 \end{align}cosh2x−sinh2x​=(coshx+sinhx)(coshx−sinhx)=(2ex+e−x​+2ex−e−x​)(2ex+e−x​−2ex−e−x​)=2ex+e−x+ex−e−x​2ex+e−x−ex+e−x​=22ex​22e−x​=exe−x=ex−x=1​​

f(−2)=(−2)4+2(−2)3−3(−2)2−4(−2)+4=16−16−12+8+4=0f(-2) = (-2)^4 + 2 (-2)^3 - 3 (-2)^2 - 4 (-2) + 4\\ = 16 - 16 - 12 + 8 + 4\\ = 0f(−2)=(−2)4+2(−2)3−3(−2)2−4(−2)+4=16−16−12+8+4=0

f(−3)=(−3)4+2(−3)3−3(−3)2−4(−3)+4=81−54−27+12+4=16f(−2)=(−2)4+2(−2)3−3(−2)2−4(−2)+4=16−16−12+8+4=0f(−1)=1−2−3+4+4=4f(−1/2)=(−1/2)4+2(−1/2)3−3(−1/2)2−4(−1/2)+4=116−218−314+412+4=116−14−34+2+4=116+5f(0)=4f(1)=1+2−3−4+4=0\begin{align} f(-3) &= (-3)^4 + 2 (-3)^3 - 3 (-3)^2 - 4 (-3) + 4\\ &= 81 - 54 - 27 + 12 + 4\\ &= 16\\ \\ f(-2) &= (-2)^4 + 2 (-2)^3 - 3 (-2)^2 - 4 (-2) + 4\\ &= 16 - 16 - 12 + 8 + 4\\ &= 0\\ \\ f(-1) &= 1 - 2 - 3 + 4 + 4\\ &= 4\\ \\ f(-1/2) &= (-1/2)^4 + 2 (-1/2)^3 - 3 (-1/2)^2 - 4 (-1/2) + 4\\ &= \frac{1}{16} - 2 \frac{1}{8} - 3 \frac{1}{4} + 4 \frac{1}{2} + 4\\ &= \frac{1}{16} - \frac{1}{4} - \frac{3}{4} + 2 + 4\\ &= \frac{1}{16} + 5\\ \\ f(0) &= 4\\ f(1) &= 1 + 2 - 3 - 4 + 4\\ &= 0\\ \end{align}f(−3)f(−2)f(−1)f(−1/2)f(0)f(1)​=(−3)4+2(−3)3−3(−3)2−4(−3)+4=81−54−27+12+4=16=(−2)4+2(−2)3−3(−2)2−4(−2)+4=16−16−12+8+4=0=1−2−3+4+4=4=(−1/2)4+2(−1/2)3−3(−1/2)2−4(−1/2)+4=161​−281​−341​+421​+4=161​−41​−43​+2+4=161​+5=4=1+2−3−4+4=0​​

children.value:
def f(x):
    return x**4 + 2*x**3 - 3*x**2 - 4*x + 4

import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

X = [-2, -1, -1/2, 0, 1]
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=[4,2])
for x in X:
    ax.scatter(x, f(x), color="steelblue")
    ax.text(x, f(x), f"{(x, f(x))}")

x = np.linspace(min(X)-0.5, max(X)+0.5, 100)
ax.plot(x, f(x), color="steelblue")

ax.axvline(0, color="gray", alpha=0.7)
ax.axhline(0, color="gray", alpha=0.7)
ax.grid(True)
fig.show()

import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

x = np.linspace(-4, 3, 100)
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=[4,2])
ax.plot(x, f(x), color="steelblue")
ax.axvline(0, color="gray", alpha=0.3)
ax.axhline(0, color="gray", alpha=0.3)
fig.show()

def f(x):
    return x * np.exp(x)


X = [-2, -1, -1/2, 0, 1]
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=[4,2])
for x in X:
    ax.scatter(x, f(x), color="steelblue")
    ax.text(x, f(x), f"({x:.1f}, {f(x):.1f})")

x = np.linspace(-3, 1, 100)
ax.plot(x, f(x), color="steelblue")

ax.axvline(0, color="gray", alpha=0.7)
ax.axhline(0, color="gray", alpha=0.7)
ax.grid(True)
fig.show()

from sympy import symbols, factor
x = symbols("x")
y = (x**2 + 2*x + 3)**(-1/2) - (1/2) * (x+4) * (x**2 + 2*x + 3)**(-3/2)
factor(y)

import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def f(x):
    return (x+4)*(x**2 +2*x + 3)**(-1/2)

x = np.linspace(-3, 1, 100)
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=[4,2])
ax.plot(x, f(x), color="steelblue")
ax.axvline(0, color="gray", alpha=0.3)
ax.axhline(0, color="gray", alpha=0.3)
fig.show()
